# RESET Radar

> Zero-login board tracking whether OpenAI Codex / ChatGPT Work and Anthropic
> Claude have publicly RESET usage limits (staff-announced, provider-wide
> "hard resets"), plus a heuristic 48-hour forecast with source evidence.
> Independent utility; not affiliated with OpenAI or Anthropic. Updated in real time.

## Core
- [Live reset status](https://reset-radar-web.pages.dev/): current public-reset state for Codex and Claude, time since the last public reset, and a 48h forecast.
- [Prerendered status + FAQ](https://reset-radar.taiwan-traffic.workers.dev/share): dated, plain-language status for each provider.

## Data (public API, no auth)
- [Snapshot JSON](https://reset-radar.taiwan-traffic.workers.dev/v1/snapshot): per-provider status cards with display_status.
- [Stats JSON](https://reset-radar.taiwan-traffic.workers.dev/v1/stats): reset counts, average interval, longest drought (hard_reset only).
- [Events JSON](https://reset-radar.taiwan-traffic.workers.dev/v1/events): confirmed public-reset timeline.

## Notes
- "Public reset" = a staff/global announcement that many paid users had usage replenished. It does not guarantee your personal quota is full.
- The 48h forecast is a deterministic heuristic (Weibull renewal survival) — not official, never a green light.
